name: Vegetable Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a pie dish with cooking spray.
2. Cut the bread slices diagonally and arrange to cover the bottom of the dish.
3. Sauté vegetables in a non-stick skillet using a bit of water or broth until crisp-tender. Remove from heat.
4. Spread sautéed vegetables into the bread crust.
5. Beat remaining ingredients together.
6. Pour the beaten mixture over the vegetables and cheese.
7. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F.
